title: apium lingula
intro: Apium lingula, also known as wild celery, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the carrot family. It is commonly found in Europe, Asia, and North Africa, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Apium lingula include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Apium lingula can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
